english: O daughter of the mountain, who delights the earth, who sports with the universe, praised by Nanda
Dwelling on the peaks of Vindhya mountain, playing with Vishnu, praised by Vishnu
roman: Girivara Vindhya shiro adhi nivasini Vishnu vilasini Jishnunute

english: O Goddess, consort of the blue-throated one (Shiva), with a vast family, doer of great deeds
roman: Bhagavati he shitiakantha kutumbini bhuri kutumbini bhuri krite

hindi: जय जय हे महिषासुरमर्दिनि रम्यकपर्दिनि शैलसुते॥
english: Victory, victory to you O slayer of Mahishasura, with beautiful matted locks, daughter of the mountain
roman: Jaya jaya he Mahishasura mardini ramya kapardini shaila sute

english: Showering blessings on the best of gods, overpowering the unconquerable, beautiful-locked daughter of the mountain
roman: Suravara varshini durdhara dharshini ramya kapardini shaila sute

english: Nourisher of three worlds, pleaser of Shankara, destroyer of sins, rejoicing in battle-cries
roman: Tribhuvana poshini Shankara toshini kilbisha moshini ghosha rate

english: Enraging the sons of Danu and Diti, draining the pride of the arrogant, daughter of the ocean
roman: Danuja niroshini Ditisuta roshini durmada shoshini sindhu sute

hindi: जय जय हे महिषासुरमर्दिनि रम्यकपर्दिनि शैलसुते॥
english: Victory, victory to you O slayer of Mahishasura, beautiful-locked daughter of the mountain
roman: Jaya jaya he Mahishasura mardini ramya kapardini shaila sute

english: O Goddess who arises to slay arrogant enemies in battle, bearing indestructible divine power
roman: Ayi ranadurmaada shatru vahodita durdhara nirjara shakti bhrite

english: O Supreme Shiva who wisely sent skilled messengers, lord of the Pramatha hosts
roman: Chatura vichara dhurina mahashiva duta krita pramatha dhipate

english: Whose intent destroys wicked, greedy and evil-minded demons and their messengers
roman: Durita duriiha durasaya durmati daanava duta kritanta mate

hindi: जय जय हे महिषासुरमर्दिनि रम्यकपर्दिनि शैलसुते॥
english: Victory, victory to you O slayer of Mahishasura, beautiful-locked daughter of the mountain
roman: Jaya jaya he Mahishasura mardini ramya kapardini shaila sute

hindi: इति शुम्भनिशुम्भदलनि वर्णिते जय जय मार्कण्डेयकृते।
english: Thus described in the composition of Markandeya — victory in the slaying of Shumbha and Nishumbha
roman: Iti shumbha nishumbha dalani varnite jaya jaya Markandeya krite

hindi: जय जय हे महिषासुरमर्दिनि रम्यकपर्दिनि शैलसुते॥
english: Victory, victory to you O slayer of Mahishasura, beautiful-locked daughter of the mountain
roman: Jaya jaya he Mahishasura mardini ramya kapardini shaila sute
